title: ACCESS TO MEDICAL - 211info
text: RESTORED CONNECTIONS PEER CENTER ACCESS TO MEDICAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance in receiving medical care services such as Oregon Health Plan (OHP) navigation, physical referrals, and transportation to/from medical appointments. 146 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals who are in recovery Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (458) 544-0000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (458) 544-0000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Navigator Programs * Substance Use Disorder Issues Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Substance Use Disorder Issues Physician Referrals * Substance Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - SUPPORTED EMPLOYMENT HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - RECOVERY BASED PEER MENTORS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - RECOVERY COMMUNITY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RESTORED CONNECTIONS PEER CENTER
